# seca Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "seca" {
  token  = "test-token"
  tenant = "tenant-1"
  region = "region-1"
  retry = {
    delay        = 30 # seconds
    interval     = 10 # seconds
    max_attempts = 5
  }
  global_providers = {
    region_v1        = "http://localhost:3000/providers/seca.region",
    authorization_v1 = "http://localhost:3000/providers/seca.authorization"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `global_providers` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--global_providers))
- `region` (String)
- `tenant` (String)
- `token` (String)

### Optional

- `retry` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--retry))

<a id="nestedatt--global_providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `global_providers`

Required:

- `region_v1` (String)

Optional:

- `authorization_v1` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--retry"></a>
### Nested Schema for `retry`

Optional:

- `delay` (Number)
- `interval` (Number)
- `max_attempts` (Number)
